title: Draper 10 Piece T-Handle Hexagon Allen Key Set | Metric Long Pattern Hand Tools | Hex Key Wrench Kit | Long Arm Chrome Vanadium Steel Kit | Steel Wall Mounting Stand| 33869
features: Precision – 10 Piece hex key set features a t-handle design, maximising torque for efficient tightening. Gain precision and productivity with this ergonomic design.

Durable – Crafted from chrome vanadium steel, our hand tools set is forged, hardened, tempered and a blackened finish, providing added corrosion protection. Enjoy durability and reliability with these high-quality tools.
Effective – Featuring chamfered ends, allowing for easy insertion into bolds and screws. Enhance your efficiency and precision with smooth operation.
Versatile – Includes sizes from 2.0 mm to 10mm making sure that no task is too big or too small ensuring high versatility.
description: From the manufacturer Draper Metric T-Handle Hex Key Set (10 Piece) Draper metric hex key set is made from chrome vanadium steel, hardened and tempered with a blackened finish to help prevent corrosion. The T-handle design maximises torque and is comfortable to grip. All tips have chamfered edges to eliminate burrs. Each tool has a convenient hang hole. Supplied with a durable steel wall mounting stand for organisation and storage Stock No: 33869 Content 10 x Hex keys: 2.0, 2.5, 3.0, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0, 5.5, 6.0, 8.0, 10mm. Supplied Supplied with a durable steel wall mounting stand for organisation and storage. Feature The T-handle design maximises torque and is comfortable to grip. Hexagon Key Draper : Draper is our core range of quality tools, suitable for use by the enthusiast and the tradesperson. The Draper brand covers all department products.
